nasb.text: Then the Lord said to Moses, “Stretch out your hand over the land of Egypt for the locusts, that they may come up on the land of Egypt and eat every plant of the land, even all that the hail has left.”

esv.text: Then the Lord said to Moses, “Stretch out your hand over the land of Egypt for the locusts, so that they may come upon the land of Egypt and eat every plant in the land, all that the hail has left.”

cnv.text: 耶和華對摩西說：“你要向埃及地伸手，使蝗蟲上埃及地來，吃盡地上所有的蔬菜，就是受冰雹擊打後留下的。”

ccb.text: 耶和华对摩西说：“你向埃及伸杖，使蝗虫飞来吃尽冰雹过后剩下的植物。”
